plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow The Complex Patient to use Face ID to unlock your vault.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow The Complex Patient to attach approximate location when you log health events (optional).
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow background location trail samples so weather overlays can reflect where you were (optional).

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow The Complex Patient to scan paper backup QR codes for account recovery.

infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow The Complex Patient to use Face ID to unlock your vault.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow notifications when your health vault is updated on another device.
